name: Chengdu Tangyuan Electric Co.,Ltd.
summary: Chengdu Tangyuan Electric Co.,Ltd. operates as a rail transit operation and maintenance solution provider in China. It also develops, manufactures, and sells inspection and monitoring, and information management systems. The company's products include car contact network detection, car contact network HD imaging monitoring, contact network ground detection and monitoring, track and tunnel inspection and monitoring, diagnostic and evaluation, and management information systems. It offers traction power supply and public works engineering services for the rail transit industry. The company was founded in 2010 and is based in Chengdu, China.
